title: Add same file to multiple items in Files Column
excerpt: Is there a way to add the same file to multiple items in the Files Column? For example, I am putting together a Marketing Campaign Planning board which requires attaching design specs to each item. Many of the items have…

posts.author: meghankmc (Meghan McMaster)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to add the same file to multiple items in the Files Column? For example, I am putting together a Marketing Campaign Planning board which requires attaching design specs to each item. Many of the items have the same design specs, so is there a way to only upload say, the Seventy Poster Specs file, just once and place it in each of the Seventy Poster items without uploading the same file multiple times?

Alternatively, is there a way to copy and paste files between items?

image1504×656 101 KB

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
@meghankmc

You can use Copy Files Pro.

Using this app you only need to upload file once and with a normal automation setup you can easily copy the file to any number of items.

The provide features like copying file to same item’s file columns, different items file columns, and to items present on another board.
